assertions.assertion: Test with role=admin claims asserts HttpStatusCode.NoContent (204)
assertions.rationale: Admin_CanDeleteProduct test sets role=admin claims and asserts Assert.Equal(HttpStatusCode.NoContent, response.StatusCode).

assertions.assertion: Test with role=viewer claims asserts HttpStatusCode.Forbidden (403)
assertions.rationale: Viewer_GetsForbidden test sets role=viewer claims and asserts Assert.Equal(HttpStatusCode.Forbidden, response.StatusCode).

assertions.assertion: Test with no claims (unauthenticated) asserts HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized (401)
assertions.rationale: Anonymous_GetsUnauthorized test sets CurrentUser = null and asserts Assert.Equal(HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized, response.StatusCode).

assertions.assertion: Each test sets distinct claims via the TestClaimsProvider before making the request
assertions.rationale: Each test sets TestIdentity.CurrentUser to a distinct ClaimsPrincipal (admin claims, viewer claims, or null) before making the HTTP request.

assertions.assertion: Uses IClassFixture<T> or equivalent to share the WebApplicationFactory across tests
assertions.rationale: AdminPolicyTests implements IClassFixture<TestApiFactory> to share the factory across tests.
